variants.title: Donaldson P566212 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge Dt | Replaces the Mahle 891017SM10
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P566212 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge Dt | Replaces the Mahle 891017SM10
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P566212 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge Dt is engineered with advanced depth filtration technology, offering enhanced dirt retention and fluid cleanliness. It ensures optimal performance in high-pressure hydraulic systems, effectively protecting critical components from wear and extending system life. This filters robust construction and superior filtration efficiency make it ideal for demanding applications. Its reliable performance helps minimize maintenance costs and system downtime, ensuring consistent operation under tough conditions.
specifications: Style: Pressure Filter, Media: Glass Fiber, Efficiency 1: 5µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 7µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 78.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 43.2 mm, Length: 209.0 mm, Δ Collapse Pressure: 21 bar, Seal Material: Viton, Temperature Range: -25 - +120°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 5µ @ β200, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 21 BAR, Seal: Viton

variants.title: MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHLP30167 Pressure Filter | Replaces the Mahle 891017SM10
variants.option1Value: MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHLP30167 Pressure Filter | Replaces the Mahle 891017SM10
variants.description: The MICROFIT® UltraGen III MFHLP30167 is the MICROFIT® approved replacement to the Mahle 891017SM10. Engineered and manufactured in Great Britain the MFHLP30167 is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of OEM quality standards, ensuring superior filtration performance and the longest possible filter life. Building on over 50 years of filtration expertise, the UltraGen III series is the third generation of MICROFIT® filter media, delivering exceptional efficiency and reliability. FilterFinder is an approved distributor of MICROFIT® filters. With expert product knowledge, dedicated support, and a large stock availability, FilterFinder ensures you receive the parts you need when you need them, every time.

variants.title: HiFi Filter SH 57119 V Pressure Filter | Replaces the Mahle 891017SM10
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SH 57119 V Pressure Filter | Replaces the Mahle 891017SM10
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SH 57119 V Hydraulic Filter. Engineered to protect and optimize the performance of hydraulic systems, this filter delivers exceptional contamination control. Premium filter media captures fine particles and debris that could compromise system integrity, helping to extend the lifespan of critical hydraulic components. By maintaining fluid cleanliness, it reduces wear and tear while supporting consistent pressure levels throughout the system. Perfect for a wide range of hydraulic applications—from industrial machinery to heavy-duty equipment—this filter provides reliable performance even under high-pressure conditions. Its robust construction ensures long-lasting durability, helping to minimize downtime and maintenance costs while maximizing operational efficiency.
specifications: Style: HYDRAULIC FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 78.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 42.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 209.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 204.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 5µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 7µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 78.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 43.2 mm, Length: 209.0 mm, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 21 BAR, Seal: Viton, Temperature Range: -25 - +120°C
